_meta.note: Atlas track DoD — tiered @EXP count (50/500/5000). dod_gate.hexa verify uses this for roadmap status promotion.

description: Definition-of-Done tiers for the atlas growth track. Each tier requires a minimum count of @EXP lines in atlas.n6 as evidence of discovery-breadth.

scaffold_done.description: Minimum viable atlas — 50+ @EXP lines, core6 modules live.
smoke: bash -c 'grep -c "^@EXP " $NEXUS/n6/atlas.n6 | awk "{ if (\$1 >= 50) exit 0; else exit 1 }"'

wired_done.description: Mid-scale atlas — 500+ @EXP lines, cross-engine bus active.
smoke: bash -c 'grep -c "^@EXP " $NEXUS/n6/atlas.n6 | awk "{ if (\$1 >= 500) exit 0; else exit 1 }"'

serving_done.description: Mature atlas — 5000+ @EXP lines, stable cross-project edges.
smoke: bash -c 'grep -c "^@EXP " $NEXUS/n6/atlas.n6 | awk "{ if (\$1 >= 5000) exit 0; else exit 1 }"'
